heading: Cadets: charges and fees for attendance; limitation
label: 1930 Cadets: charges and fees for attendance; limitation
notes: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 197 of this title2014—Subsec. (b). struck out “of Homeland Security” after “Secretary”.Pub. L. 113–281
amendments: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 197 of this title2014—Subsec. (b). struck out “of Homeland Security” after “Secretary”.Pub. L. 113–281

children.heading: .—Prohibition
children.label: a .—Prohibition
children.text: Except as provided in subsection (b), no charge or fee for tuition, room, or board for attendance at the Academy may be imposed unless the charge or fee is specifically authorized by a law enacted after .October 5, 1994

children.heading: .—Exception
children.label: b .—Exception
children.text: The prohibition specified in subsection (a) does not apply with respect to any item or service provided to cadets for which a charge or fee is imposed as of . The Secretary shall notify Congress of any change made by the Academy in the amount of a charge or fee authorized under this subsection.October 5, 1994
